title: Patch-Seq Recording and Extraction Detailed Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c1uf3","text":"This protocol is a detailed version of the Allen Institute's Patch-Seq Recording and Extraction protocol, which describes the process to obtain electrophysiological recordings and cellular contents from neurons in postnatal mouse and/or human brain slices.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3dv53","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2mbjg","text":"Note: Research reported in this publication was supported by the National Institute Of Mental Health of the National Institutes of Health under Award Number U19MH114830.
